description: Inline <script> block executes synchronously in <body>, blocking parser and increasing Total Blocking Time.
recommendation: Move to external file with defer attribute or wrap in DOMContentLoaded listener.

description: No external JavaScript files use async or defer attributes. All scripting is inline and synchronous.
recommendation: Extract JS to external files; use defer for DOM-dependent scripts, async for independent scripts.

description: innerHTML injects unsanitized location.hash into DOM, creating XSS risk and potential unexpected layout shifts.
recommendation: Use textContent instead of innerHTML to prevent XSS and layout changes.

description: @font-face for CustomFont lacks font-display: swap, causing invisible text (FOIT) during font load.
recommendation: Add font-display: swap to the @font-face declaration.

description: Custom font /fonts/custom.woff2 is not preloaded; browser discovers it late during CSS parsing.
recommendation: Add <link rel="preload" href="/fonts/custom.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin /> in <head>.

description: Image /public/promo.png lacks width and height attributes, causing layout shift when image loads.
recommendation: Add explicit width and height attributes to the element.

description: External stylesheet loaded synchronously in <head> blocks rendering until fully downloaded.
recommendation: Inline critical CSS and load non-critical CSS asynchronously with preload/onload pattern.

description: No resource hints for cdn.example.com, adding DNS/connection overhead.
recommendation: Add <link rel="preconnect"> and <link rel="dns-prefetch"> for cdn.example.com.
